manifest.name: USA TV
manifest.description: USA TV provides access to channels across various categories including local channels, news, sports, entertainment, premium, lifestyle, kids' shows, documentaries, Latino programming, and much more.

manifest.name: Cinemeta
manifest.description: The official addon for movie and series catalogs

manifest.name: Gemini AI Recommender
manifest.description: Smart personalized recommendations for Movies and Series using your Trakt watch history and Google Gemini AI.

manifest.name: Ratings
manifest.description: Shows IMDb ratings for movies and individual TV episodes with a completely configurable format. Works with anime.

manifest.name: Orion
manifest.description: Orion Stremio Addon, allows Orion-indexed torrent, usenet and hoster links to be played on Stremio. Cached links can be played with RealDebrid, AllDebrid, Debrid-Link, Premiumize or Offcloud. Torrents can be streamed without using any Debrid service. Orion API key is required to use this addon. Get it from panel.orionoid.com

manifest.name: DMM
manifest.description: Cast your preferred Debrid Media Manager streams to your Stremio device; supports Anime, TV shows and Movies!

manifest.name: Addons
manifest.description: Provides the Community Stremio Addons catalog from stremio-addons.net.

manifest.name: TMDB
manifest.description: Stremio addon that provides rich metadata for movies and TV shows from TMDB, featuring customizable catalogs, multi-language support, favorites lists, watchlist, ratings, and IMDb integration. Current settings: Language: en-US | TMDB Account: Connected | MDBList Integration: Not Connected | IMDb Integration: Enabled | RPDB Integration: Enabled | Search: Enabled | Active Catalogs: 4

manifest.name: SubSource
manifest.description: Unofficial addon for getting subtitles from SubSource.net

manifest.name: YIFY
manifest.description: Addon for getting subtitles from yifysubtitles, by Dexter21767.

manifest.name: OpenSubtitles
manifest.description: Addon for getting subtitles from opensubtitles.org, by Dexter21767.

manifest.name: Local Files
manifest.description: Local add-on to find playable files: .torrent, .mp4, .mkv and .avi

manifest.name: Torrentio RD
manifest.description: Provides torrent streams from scraped torrent providers. Currently supports YTS(+), EZTV(+), RARBG(+), 1337x(+), ThePirateBay(+), KickassTorrents(+), TorrentGalaxy(+), MagnetDL(+), HorribleSubs(+), NyaaSi(+), TokyoTosho(+), AniDex(+), nekoBT(+), Rutor(+), Rutracker(+), Comando(+), BluDV(+), MicoLeaoDublado(+), Torrent9(+), ilCorSaRoNeRo(+), MejorTorrent(+), Wolfmax4k(+), Cinecalidad(+), BestTorrents(+) and RealDebrid enabled. To configure providers, RealDebrid/Premiumize/AllDebrid/DebridLink/EasyDebrid/Offcloud/TorBox/Put.io support and other settings visit https://torrentio.strem.fun

manifest.name: AIOMetadata
manifest.description: A metadata addon for power users. AIOMetadata uses TMDB, TVDB, TVMaze, MyAnimeList, IMDB and Fanart.tv to provide accurate data for movies, series, and anime. You choose the source.

manifest.name: TVFlix
manifest.description: Optimized for Speed and Reliability. Hybrid RD+TorBox.
